revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - update
1 revision imported: importing last templates I do not have

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Country data British Columbia]]
Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = British Columbia | flag alias = Flag of British Columbia.svg | flag alias-1870 = Flag of the Colony of British Columbia.svg | flag alias-1871 = Flag of Canada (1868–1921).svg | flag alias-1921 = Flag of Canada (1921–1957).svg | flag alias-1957 = Flag of Canada (1957–1965).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1870 | var2 = 1871 | var3 = 1921 | var4 = 1957 </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories| }}</noinclude> \n</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = British Columbia | flag alias = Flag of British Columbia.svg | flag alias-1870 = Flag of the Colony of British Columbia.svg | flag alias-1871 = Flag of Canada (1868–1921).svg | flag alias-1921 = Flag of Canada (1921–1957).svg | flag alias-1957 = Flag of Canada (1957–1965).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1870 | var2 = 1871 | var3 = 1921 | var4 = 1957 </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude> \n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = British Columbia | flag alias = Flag of British Columbia.svg | flag alias-1870 = Flag of the Colony of British Columbia.svg | flag alias-1871 = Flag of Canada (1868–1921).svg | flag alias-1921 = Flag of Canada (1921–1957).svg | flag alias-1957 = Flag of Canada (1957–1965).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1870 | var2 = 1871 | var3 = 1921 | var4 = 1957 </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_British_Columbia here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_British_Columbia for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = British Columbia | flag alias = Flag of British Columbia.svg | flag alias-1870 = Flag of the Colony of British Columbia.svg | flag alias-1871 = Flag of Canada (1868–1921).svg | flag alias-1921 = Flag of Canada (1921–1957).svg | flag alias-1957 = Flag of Canada (1957–1965).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1870 | var2 = 1871 | var3 = 1921 | var4 = 1957 </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude> \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
